architecture.data_flow: Sliders → formula compute → sphere position + display panel

responsibilities.main.js: Three.js init, scene setup, axes/grid/labels, sphere, render loop, updateSphere/updateDisplayPanel
responsibilities.sliders.js: Slider event binding, formula computation, coordinate update trigger

architecture.cache_strategy: HTML: Cache-Control no-cache header; Assets: ?v=0.0.1 token under /projects/inner-compass/
architecture.deployment: Nginx (port 19011) reverse proxy to uvicorn FastAPI
